ddls:
CREATE TABLE "web_applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each web application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the web application */,
  "app_url" TEXT /* URL of the web application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the web application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the web application the page belongs to */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES web_applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the page the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field (e.g., text, checkbox, radio button) */,
  "field_label" TEXT /* Label of the field */,
  "field_placeholder" TEXT /* Placeholder text of the field */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the field is required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the field was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "ua_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent */,
  "ua_name" TEXT /* Name of the user agent (browser) */,
  "ua_version" TEXT /* Version of the user agent */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ua_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the web application the session belongs to */,
  "ua_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user agent (browser) used in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent in the session (in seconds) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the session is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the interaction belongs to */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the page the interaction occurred on */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field interacted with */,
  "is_present" INTEGER /* Whether the field was present during the interaction */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the field during the interaction */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the field during the interaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the field during the interaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., click, hover, input) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session the feedback belongs to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., usability, performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, designer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role" (
  "ur_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ur_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permission" (
  "rp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permission_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
